product_overview: ShiftPlanner is a web-based shift scheduling app for creating, editing, auto-generating, importing, and tracking personnel shifts across months. It provides a monthly calendar, personnel management, constraint-driven solver, AI-powered image import, and cumulative tracking with cloud sync.
core_goals: Provide an easy-to-use monthly calendar UI to view and edit shift assignments
Allow manual and automated (solver) generation of optimized schedules based on configurable constraints
Support smart image-based import of schedules via Gemini AI and robust error handling when AI keys are absent
Enable personnel management with tags, preferences and unavailable dates
Persist schedule versions and surface rule violations in real-time
Offer cumulative shift tracking across months with optional Firebase sync

features.name: Monthly Calendar View
features.description: View and navigate a monthly shift schedule showing daily slots and assigned personnel, with calendar/list toggles.
user_flows: GET /api/state -> Receive 200 with full workspace state (people, shifts, rules, holidays) -> GET /api/state?month=2026-03 -> Receive 200 with requested month's schedule
GET /api/state -> Receive 503 Service Unavailable (backend down) -> UI shows error banner and falls back to cached view

features.name: Shift Assignment
features.description: Manually assign or clear personnel to specific shift slots for a chosen day and persist changes.
user_flows: POST /api/shifts with payload {date: "2026-03-01", slot: "1A", personId: 42} -> Receive 200 with updated shift record -> POST /api/highlights with payload {date: "2026-03-01", note: "updated"} -> Receive 200 confirmation
POST /api/shifts with payload containing invalid personId -> Receive 400 with error {message: "invalid person"} -> UI shows validation error and assignment is not applied

features.name: Auto-Generate Schedule (Solver)
features.description: Automatically generate an optimized schedule for the selected month using configured constraints and apply or save results.
user_flows: POST /api/solve with payload {month: "2026-03", mode: "all"} -> Receive 200 with generated schedule preview -> POST /api/shifts with generated schedule payload -> Receive 200 and calendar updated
POST /api/solve with insufficient constraints or solver error -> Receive 500 with error {message: "solver failure"} -> UI shows solver error and suggests adjusting rules

features.name: Smart Import (AI Image Import)
features.description: Upload or paste a schedule image and use Gemini AI to extract shift assignments for review and application.
user_flows: GET /api/gemini-status -> Receive 200 with {available: true} -> POST /api/smart-import with multipart image payload -> Receive 200 with extracted shifts -> POST /api/shifts with extracted shifts to apply -> Receive 200

GET /api/gemini-status -> Receive 200 with {available: false} OR POST /api/smart-import when GEMINI_API_KEY not configured -> Receive 400 with {message: "Gemini API key missing"} -> UI shows explanation and disables Smart Import

features.name: Schedule History / Versions
features.description: Save current schedule as a version, view the list of saved versions, and restore previous versions.
user_flows: POST /api/versions with payload {name: "Mar 2026 snapshot", schedule: {...}} -> Receive 201 with {versionId: "v123", timestamp: "..."} -> GET /api/state -> Receive 200 with updated versions list
POST /api/versions with malformed schedule payload -> Receive 400 with validation errors -> UI prevents saving and surfaces error messages

features.name: Violation Panel
features.description: Display constraint violations for the current month in real-time and allow the user to locate offending days.
user_flows: POST /api/violations with payload {month: "2026-03"} -> Receive 200 with violations list [{day: "2026-03-10", rule: "max-consecutive", severity: "high"}] -> GET /api/state -> Receive 200 to highlight the problematic day in UI
POST /api/violations with invalid month format -> Receive 422 with {message: "invalid month"} -> UI shows no violations and requests corrected input

features.name: Personnel Management
features.description: Add, edit, and delete team members including call tags, color, target counts and unavailable dates.
user_flows: GET /api/state -> Receive 200 with current people list -> POST /api/people with payload {name: "Alex", color: "#ffcc00", tags: ["1st"], targets: {...}} -> Receive 201 with {personId: 55} -> GET /api/state -> Receive 200 with updated people
POST /api/people with duplicate unique field (e.g., same id) -> Receive 409 Conflict with {message: "person exists"} -> UI shows conflict error and blocks duplicate creation

features.name: Scheduling Rules / Constraints
features.description: Create and manage scheduling rules that the solver will enforce (e.g., max consecutive days, tag-specific limits).
user_flows: GET /api/state -> Receive 200 with existing rules -> POST /api/constraints with payload {name: "MaxConsec", targetTag: "1st", condition: "<=", value: 3} -> Receive 201 with new rule id -> GET /api/state -> Receive 200 reflecting the new rule
POST /api/constraints with invalid condition/value types -> Receive 400 with {message: "invalid constraint"} -> UI rejects the rule and prompts correction

features.name: Thai Holidays Display
features.description: Fetch and display Thai public holidays to mark special days in the calendar and influence scheduling.
user_flows: GET /api/holidays -> Receive 200 with holidays array [{date: "2026-04-06", name: "Chakri Day"}] -> GET /api/state -> Receive 200 and calendar highlights holidays
GET /api/holidays -> Receive 503 Service Unavailable (holiday API down) -> UI shows a reload button and displays cached holidays if available

features.name: Cumulative Shift Tracking
features.description: View per-person shift counts across the past months and finalize a month to sync data to the cloud (Firebase when configured).
user_flows: GET /api/state -> Receive 200 with cumulative counts for last 6 months -> POST /api/versions with payload {finalizeMonth: "2026-02", summary: {...}} -> Receive 200 with {synced: true} (Firebase sync initiated)

GET /api/state -> Receive 200 with cumulative data -> POST /api/versions with payload {finalizeMonth: "2026-02"} -> Receive 500 with {message: "Firebase not configured"} -> UI shows a clear message that cloud sync is disabled and provides instructions to configure Firebase

tech_stack.other: React Router v7, Zustand, date-fns, GSAP, Firebase, better-sqlite3

routes.description: Main monthly shift schedule calendar dashboard
Personnel management - add, edit, delete team members and their shift preferences
Workspace configuration - custom tags, scheduling rules/constraints, and Thai holidays
Cumulative shift tracking dashboard across multiple months, synced with Firebase

features.name: Monthly Calendar View
features.description: View and navigate a monthly shift schedule calendar showing assigned personnel per day/slot
user_interactions: Click left/right arrows to navigate months
View shift slots (1A, 1B, 2nd Call, 3rd Call) per calendar day
Click a day cell to open shift assignment panel
Toggle between calendar and list view

features.name: Shift Assignment
features.description: Manually assign or clear personnel to shift slots (1A, 1B, 2, 3) for each day
user_interactions: Click on a calendar day to select it
Search for a person by name in the assignment panel
Click a person to assign them to a slot
Click trash icon to remove an assignment
Click Save button to persist changes

features.name: Auto-Generate Schedule (Solver)
features.description: Automatically generate an optimized shift schedule for the selected month using a constraint solver
user_interactions: Click the Solve/Generate button
Select solve mode (all slots or partial)
View generated schedule applied to the calendar
Save generated schedule

features.name: Smart Import (AI Image Import)
features.description: Upload a schedule image and use Gemini AI to extract shift assignments automatically
user_interactions: Click Smart Import button to open modal
Upload or paste an image of a schedule
Review extracted shifts from AI
Apply extracted shifts to the calendar

features.name: Schedule History / Versions
features.description: Save and restore historical versions of the shift schedule
user_interactions: Click the History button to open the history modal
View list of saved versions with timestamps
Click a version to restore it
Save current schedule as a new version

features.name: Violation Panel
features.description: Real-time display of scheduling constraint violations for the current month
user_interactions: Click Violations button to open/close the panel
View list of rule violations with severity
Click a violation to highlight the problematic day

features.name: Personnel Management
features.description: Add, edit, and delete team members with their shift preferences, tags, and unavailable dates
user_interactions: Click Add Person button to open the add form
Fill in name, select color, assign call tags (1st/2nd/3rd)
Set target shift counts (total, holiday, weekday)
Mark unavailable dates on the mini calendar
Click Save to persist, or Cancel to discard
Click Edit icon on a person card to edit them
Click Delete icon to remove a person

features.name: Scheduling Rules / Constraints
features.description: Define scheduling constraints applied to tags during auto-generation
user_interactions: Click New Rule button to open constraint form
Enter rule name, select target tag, choose condition, set value
Click Save Rule to persist
Click Edit icon on a rule to modify it
Click Delete icon to remove a rule

features.name: Thai Holidays Display
features.description: View auto-fetched Thai public holidays used to highlight days in the calendar
user_interactions: View list of holidays on the settings page
Click Reload to refresh holiday data

features.name: Cumulative Shift Tracking
features.description: View and track cumulative shift history per person across the last 6 months, with Firebase sync
user_interactions: View table of personnel with monthly shift counts
See deficit/surplus badges per person
Select a month to finalize
Click Finalize Month button to save month data to Firebase
Expand a row to see month-by-month breakdown

known_limitations.issue: Smart Import requires a Gemini API key configured in .env; without it the feature returns a 400 error
known_limitations.impact: Smart Import will show an error if GEMINI_API_KEY is not set

known_limitations.issue: Cumulative data sync requires Firebase to be configured
known_limitations.impact: Cloud sync is disabled when Firebase is not configured

known_limitations.issue: No authentication system; any user can toggle editor/guest mode via UI
